title: Star Wars Palladium
description: First ever star wars addon for minecraft palladium 1.20.1, adds in lightsabers, force powers, and materials.
body:
This is (I think) the first ever Star Wars addon for Palladium 1.20.1.

To get a functional lightsaber, you must create a kyber crystal and a lightsaber hilt. To insert the kyber crystal, hold the lightsaber in your offhand, and the kyber crystal in your main hand, then right click. To extract it, hold the lightsaber in your offhand and shift + rightclick. To turn your lightsaber on, shift + right click with the lightsaber in your main hand.

This adds in multiple lightsaber types (currently 2 in survival) which can be acquired. A force power is also available to craft and gives you: heightened speed, health and force abilities. More information can be found on my discord.
